name: 侯爵娘子

appearance.face: 贵妇气质，妆容精致，神情社交化且热络
appearance.distinguishing_features: 典型上流社交场女主人形象

costume.typical_outfit: 华贵社交礼服，珠翠齐整

visual_reference: Chinese noble lady in her 30s to 40s, elegant makeup, luxurious hairstyle with ornaments, rich crimson formal hanfu, polished high-society presence, ancient drama style
personality: 圆滑得体，作为社交场的组织者，主要承担场景连接功能。
desire: 维持社交圈体面与热闹。
scene_presence: 举办马球会，为高令宁、蒋晟、沈词、陆姝仪提供同场碰撞场域。
